title: easySFTP configuration
description: Deployment configuration for the easySFTP GitHub Action. Connection settings (server, credentials, host key) are NOT part of this file — keep those in action inputs / secrets.

strategy.description: Default strategy for all targets. Defaults to 'overlay'.

ignore.description: Global gitignore-style exclude patterns applied to every target.

guards.description: Safety limits applied before any deletion.

max_deletes.description: Refuse a run that would delete more than this many files. 0 means unlimited. Deleting the remote root is always refused, regardless of this value.

targets.description: One or more local => remote deployment targets.

local.description: Local path (file or directory) to upload.

strategy.description: Overrides the top-level strategy for this target.

ignore.description: Target-specific exclude patterns, additive to the global ones.
